title: swertia subuniflora
intro: Swertia subuniflora, also known as the 'Yunnan Swertia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. The medicinal properties of Swertia subuniflora lie in its iridoid glycosides, which have been studied for their potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Swertia subuniflora include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. Swertia subuniflora is commonly used in traditional herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically prepared by steeping the dried roots or leaves in hot water.
